title: Alchemist Origin
description: An origin for those who have studied minerals to a near maximum extent.
body:
A origin made for a friend. The Alchemist, for the ones who has studied minerals to a near maximum extent. For the admins out there, i have made 2 versions. One that is unchouseable, and can only be gotten with commands for better control. Another that is free for the pick.

# Stunted
You have stunted your growth after leaning over desks and slouching as you studied. You have less health, move slower, and are smaller.

# Expensive Taste
You can only eat golden foods.

# Big Brain
Ya Big Brain need no helmets.

# Mineral Conversion
Convert materals in your hand to another materal thru alchemy. 

- Gold ←→ Iron
- Copper ←→ Brass
- Diamonds → 16 Emeralds
- Emerald → Amethyst Shard
- Amethyst Shard → Quartz
- Quartz → Emerald
- Suger → Redstone
- Glowstone Dust → Gunpowder
- Clay Ball → Slimeball
- Carrot → Golden Carrot
- Apple → Golden Apple
- Melon → Glistering Melon

# Material Construction
When you hold a item with durability in your offhand, it will repair said item at the cost of iron or gold nuggets in your inventory.
